# jamfschool_location (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jamf School location by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jamfschool_location" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "location_name" {
  value = data.jamfschool_location.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Unique identifier.

### Read-Only

- `asm_identifier` (String) ASM identifier.
- `city` (String) City.
- `is_district` (Boolean) Whether this is a district.
- `name` (String) Location name.
- `postal_code` (String) Postal code.
- `school_number` (String) School number.
- `source` (String) Source.
- `street` (String) Street.
- `street_number` (String) Street number.
